heading: Today
text: Some pockets of sunshine in the morning, then increasing cloud cover in the afternoon with a chance of showers arriving from the west. Highs in the 50s to near 60 north of Route 4, into the low to mid 60s south. Light and variable wind.

heading: Tonight
text: Rain showers spreading east, developing into freezing rain across northern NH. Lows in the 30s east of the Greens, from the upper 30s into the low 40s west. Southwest wind at 5 to 10 mph, gusting 25 to 30 mph with the strongest gusts west of the Greens.

heading: Sunday, Easter
text: Periods of rain and showers spreading east. Highs from near 50 in the north, increasing to near 60 as you head south. South wind near 10 mph, turning west, occasionally gusting to 20 mph over the higher hills.
